sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Left knee pain
History of Present Illness
The patient reports deep aching pain in both knees over the past six months, exacerbated by weight-bearing and prolonged activity. He describes the pain as achy and states that rest does not relieve it. The patient reports pain located behind their kneecaps. He also reports pain in his left hand. The patient reports pain and states that it is not relieved by rest. The patient describes the pain as achy.
Findings
Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the patellofemoral joint. Range of motion is limited. No swelling is noted.
Assessment
The patient has knee pain and is experiencing pain.
Plan
The doctor recommends ibuprofen. The doctor recommends aleve. The doctor recommends tylonol. Start ibuprofen 200mg twice daily. Follow up in 4 weeks if symptoms persist.
medical_concepts: tenderness to palpation over the patellofemoral joint
tenderness to palpation over the patellofemoral joint
